synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0594 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 libpq security update
description:
[16.11-3]
- Release bump

[16.11-1]
- Rebase to upstream release 16.11
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0594

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0594.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libpq-16.11-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
libpq-devel-16.11-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libpq-16.11-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
libpq-devel-16.11-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/libpq-16.11-3.el10_1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-12818




Description of changes:

[16.11-3]
- Release bump

[16.11-1]
- Rebase to upstream release 16.11
